Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-02 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
FORM ranks #1 with a composite score of 93.9, driven by exceptional ratio consistency (94.9 score) and resilience during market downturns (99.4 bad-spy score), though its momentum signal has turned negative at -1.52 with a "stalling" flag—suggesting the 230% six-month run may be losing steam despite passing all SMA gates. AU shows dramatically different characteristics: a 338% one-year return with perfect ratio passes (5/5) and a notably weak bad-spy score of only 0.885, indicating it tends to decline sharply when SPY falls, which contrasts sharply with FORM's defensive positioning. The top two ranked tickers appear to represent opposite momentum profiles—FORM is a well-gated, volatile gainer holding up on market stress days, while AU is an explosive performer that lacks downside resilience. Both maintain positions above their 30/50/100/200-day SMAs, but FORM's deteriorating momentum signal warrants attention despite its current top ranking.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
